reference: THEN HE KISSED THE EUNUCH'S HEAD AND SPAKE HIM FAIR TILL HE WENT AWAY BUT THE CASTRATO FETCHED A ROUND AND RETURNING SECRETLY CAME AND STOOD BEHIND THE FIREMAN FEARING TO GO BACK TO HIS MISTRESS WITHOUT TIDINGS
text: Then he kissed the eunuch's head and spake him fair till he went away; but the castrato fetched a round and, returning secretly, came and stood behind the fireman, fearing to go back to his mistress without tidings.
